arrayOfTransitRequestBean_1.message:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="yes"?> <ns2:Msg xmlns:ns2="http://brz.gv.at/ezoll/V01" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance"> <ns2:MsgSdr>swp.transit.agent</ns2:MsgSdr> <ns2:MsgRcp>NTA.AT</ns2:MsgRcp> <ns2:PrepDT>{{object.PrepDT}}</ns2:PrepDT> <ns2:ICRef>{{object.ICRef}}</ns2:ICRef> <ns2:Appl>acc</ns2:Appl> <ns2:Test>1</ns2:Test> <ns2:MsgTyp>CC044C</ns2:MsgTyp> <!--_______________________________________End of AT Header_________________________________________-->
<ns4:CC044C xmlns:ns4="http://ncts.dgtaxud.ec" xmlns:ns3="urn:eds:datamodel:EDS:EDS_EXTENSIONS:1"> <Extensions> <ns3:SequenceNumeric>{{object.SequenceNumeric}}</ns2:SequenceNumeric> <ns3:Key>{{object.Key}}</ns2:Key> <ns3:Value>{{object.Value}}</ns2:Value> <ns3:DataType>{{object.DataType}}</ns2:DataType> </Extensions> <messageSender>{{object.messageSender}}</messageSender> <messageRecipient>{{object.messageRecipient}}</messageRecipient> <preparationDateAndTime>{{object.preparationDateAndTime}}</preparationDateAndTime> <messageIdentification>{{object.messageIdentification}}</messageIdentification> <messageType>{{object.messageType}}</messageType> <correlationIdentifier>{{object.correlationIdentifier}}</correlationIdentifier> <TransitOperation> <MRN>{{object.MRN}}</MRN> </TransitOperation> <CustomsOfficeOfDestinationActual> <referenceNumber>{{object.referenceNumber}}</referenceNumber> </CustomsOfficeOfDestinationActual> <TraderAtDestination> <identificationNumber>{{object.identificationNumber}}</identificationNumber> </TraderAtDestination> <UnloadingRemark> <conform>{{object.conform}}</conform> <unloadingCompletion>{{object.unloadingCompletion}}</unloadingCompletion> <unloadingDate>{{object.unloadingDate}}</unloadingDate> <stateOfSeals>{{object.stateOfSeals}}</stateOfSeals> </UnloadingRemark> </ns4:CC044C>
<!--_______________________________________Start of AT Footer_______________________________________--> </ns2:Msg>
